description: A rider standing on a moving solid inherits that solid's per-tick world delta — the two-body CARRY half: horizontal carry (a platform sliding sideways takes the rider with it) and descending carry (a sinking platform the rider follows down instead of floating off). Vertical-up carry already works via the solid push-out. Order it FIRST in the rider's behaviors: it probes for a carryTag entity the rider rested on last tick (the carrier's pre-tick top, so a fast-descending platform keeps the rider) and adds the carrier's x/y deltas to the rider, gated on the rider not rising (vy>=0). The rider's solid-collide re-resolves it snug on top and move-platformer composes its walk, so it can walk while being carried. A carrier is any carryTag entity that moves (tween/velocity); tag it solid too so solid-collide keeps the rider on it. Author carriers before riders for zero-lag.

carryTag.description: Tag marking carrier entities to ride (default "carrier").

stick.description: Feet-probe tolerance in px around the carrier's top (structural; default 2).
